roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DA PEOP OPPOS TO DEFT MOT TO SET ASIDE INFO PC995 FILED TODAY IN RM101
PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO 1538,5PC MOT TO SUPPRESS FILED
DEFT'S 1538,5PC MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/X:11350(A)HS IS LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF 11351HS IN COUNT 2 BY STIPULATION,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/IBARRA/PRES:07-15-09/SA2:THE EL TREBOL BAR AT 3149 22ND STREET/SAORD/

/WIT SWORN:SFPD REY VARGAS/WIT SWORN:SFPD LAWRENCE MACK/EXM:PEOPLE'S 1A,1B,1C,1D,/X:DEFENDANTS REPLY TO THE PEOPLE'S OPP TO MOTION TO SUPPRESS, FILED IN OPEN COURT/HTA1:11352A,11351/BAIL:60,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG AND MTN TO SUPPRESS/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL WAIVES SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR TODAYS PROCEEDING ONLY/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MTN TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:DEFT WAIVES 10, BUT NOT 60 DAYS/LD:05-11-09/987,2/BAIL:60,000/CONTD:JOIN CO-DEFT AND TOSET/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LD:07-20-09/987,2/CONTD:PRETRIAL AND TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL:JOIN CO-DEFT AND TO SET/LD:05-11-09/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FORPRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
